collections.name: post
collections.label: Posts
collections.description: Blog posts. New posts appear on the homepage and in /posts/.

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Summary
fields.description: Shown in post lists and as the meta description. 1–2 sentences.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body (Markdown)
fields.description: Raw markdown. Hugo shortcodes like {{< mermaid >}} are preserved here.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Publish date. Used for sorting and the archive feed.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: SEO / grouping — optional. Safe to leave as-is.

fields.name: draft
fields.label: Draft
fields.description: When ON, the page is hidden from the live site.

collections.name: roast
collections.label: Roasts
collections.description: Coffee roast log. Phone-friendly: scroll top→bottom in the order you actually fill fields during a roast.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Roast date. Sorts the roast index.

fields.name: origin
fields.label: Origin
fields.description: Country and farm/region/lot. Example: "Ethiopia — Kayon Mountain, Taaroo".

fields.name: process
fields.label: Process
fields.description: Washed, Natural, Honey, Anaerobic, etc. Read it off the bean bag.

fields.name: product_url
fields.label: Bean source URL
fields.description: Link to the product page where the green beans were purchased. Lets you re-buy and helps readers find the same lot.

fields.name: vendor
fields.label: Vendor (optional)
fields.description: Human-readable name of the seller (e.g. "The Captain's Coffee"). If blank, the page shows the URL's domain.

fields.name: target_level
fields.label: Target roast level
fields.description: Drives the expected-range panel. Dropdown to avoid typos that would silently break the lookup.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Always keep "roast". Add origin, varietal, process.

fields.name: batch_size_g
fields.label: Batch size (g green)
fields.description: Grams of green charged. ½ lb (227 g) is the Behmor's comfortable batch.

fields.name: profile
fields.label: Starting profile
fields.description: P1–P5 = power levels (0/25/50/75/100%). Start pre-FC on P4 or automatic; drop to P3 (50%) at first crack. P4/P5 not recommended after FC — risk scorching.

fields.name: weight_setting
fields.label: Weight setting
fields.description: Sets the default program time: ¼ lb = 8:30, ½ lb = 12:00, 1 lb = 18:00. Match to actual charge.

fields.name: green_weight_g
fields.label: Green weight (g)
fields.description: Exact weighed grams BEFORE the roast. Fill in when you weigh the batch — used to compute loss %.

fields.name: ambient_f
fields.label: Ambient temp (°F)
fields.description: Room or outdoor temp at roast start. Higher temp → earlier FC and compounding heat in back-to-back sessions.

fields.name: ambient_rh
fields.label: Ambient humidity (%RH)
fields.description: Relative humidity at roast start. Higher RH → beans carry more moisture → longer drying phase → FC may come later.

fields.name: bean_notes
fields.label: Bean-specific notes
fields.description: What makes THIS bean distinct — flavor goals beyond the level-default, density quirks, things to watch.

fields.name: playbook
fields.label: Today's playbook
fields.description: Step-by-step plan for this specific roast. Ambient temp, FC window estimate, drop trigger, between-roast cool time.

fields.name: time_to_fc
fields.label: Time to first crack (mm:ss)
fields.description: Elapsed from Start to the first audible pop. Format 09:30.

fields.name: color_at_fc
fields.label: Color at first crack
fields.description: Quick observation at FC start. Example: "light tan, no smoke yet".

fields.name: smell_at_fc
fields.label: Smell at first crack
fields.description: Quick observation. Example: "bread-y / sweet / faint caramel".

fields.name: interventions
fields.label: Mid-roast button log
fields.description: What makes a roast repeatable: every Behmor button press, in order, with the elapsed time. Format one per line: 'MM:SS — what you pressed'. Example: '10:21 — P3 (drop to 50% manual)' / '10:21 — D (drum high)' / '12:30 — + extended 0:30' / '13:45 — Cool'. Future-you needs this to replicate a good roast or diagnose a bad one.

fields.name: total_time
fields.label: Total roast time (mm:ss)
fields.description: Elapsed from Start to when you hit Cool / dropped. Cooling cycle NOT included.

fields.name: why_dropped
fields.label: Why dropped
fields.description: What you saw/heard that triggered the drop. Useful next time you're between SC snaps and second.

fields.name: anything_weird
fields.label: Anything weird
fields.description: Stalls, uneven roast, smoke earlier than expected, scorched beans, anything off. Leave blank if nothing.

fields.name: roasted_weight_g
fields.label: Roasted weight (g)
fields.description: Weighed grams AFTER cooling. Page computes loss % from this and the green weight.

fields.name: roasted_photo
fields.label: Roasted beans photo
fields.description: Upload a photo of the cooled finished beans to document color. Phone uploads work — Tina pushes to static/imgs/.

fields.name: tasting_notes
fields.label: Tasting notes (after 12–24h rest)
fields.description: Aroma, acidity, body, sweetness, finish. Brew method + ratio if relevant.

fields.name: rating
fields.label: Rating (1–10)
fields.description: Your subjective score of the cup after resting.

fields.name: next_time
fields.label: What to change next time
fields.description: Specific adjustments for the next batch of this bean. Drop earlier? More dev? Different weight setting?

fields.name: body
fields.label: Anything else (freeform markdown)
fields.description: Optional. Use for photos, tables, links, or anything that doesn't fit the structured fields above.

fields.name: roaster
fields.label: Roaster
fields.description: Defaults to Behmor 2000 AB Plus. Drives the machine-specific data panel on each roast page (file at data/machines/<key>.yaml).

fields.name: draft
fields.label: Draft
fields.description: When ON, this roast is hidden from the live site.

collections.name: draft
collections.label: Drafts
collections.description: Scratch pages that live at the site root. Marked draft — not on the live site until you flip the Draft switch off.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body (Markdown)
fields.description: Raw markdown. Hugo shortcodes like {{< mermaid >}} are preserved here.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Publish date. Used for sorting and the archive feed.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: SEO / grouping — optional. Safe to leave as-is.

fields.name: draft
fields.label: Draft
fields.description: When ON, the page is hidden from the live site.

collections.name: home
collections.label: Page: Home
collections.description: The text on the site's home page. Affects what visitors see first.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Optional. The home page falls back to the site title if blank.

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Intro / Summary
fields.description: The intro paragraph shown above the recent posts list.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: Main page content. Use the toolbar for headings, lists, and links.

fields.name: coverImg
fields.label: Cover Image
fields.description: Filename of an image in static/imgs/ (e.g. wd_logo.svg). Optional.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Publish date. Used for sorting and the archive feed.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: SEO / grouping — optional. Safe to leave as-is.

fields.name: draft
fields.label: Draft
fields.description: When ON, the page is hidden from the live site.

collections.name: about
collections.label: Page: About
collections.description: The About / Resume page. Long-form content with headings is fine here.

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Summary
fields.description: Short tagline shown under the title.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: Main page content. Use the toolbar for headings, lists, and links.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Publish date. Used for sorting and the archive feed.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: SEO / grouping — optional. Safe to leave as-is.

fields.name: draft
fields.label: Draft
fields.description: When ON, the page is hidden from the live site.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
